steps.title: Spot the directional shift
steps.content: The word “However” marks where the passage changes direction—from stating what archaeologists assume to introducing a recent discovery that contradicts it.

steps.title: Match the structure
steps.content:
The passage presents a common view, then pivots to evidence that challenges it.

Choice A names this structure directly: common view, then recent finding that challenges it.

The other choices describe different structures—
  • B compares methods
  • C resolves contradictions that were never raised
  • D addresses research gaps the passage doesn't identify
.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
